body: Masking was typically done with a `OutputVar` whose data consists of `NaN`s and ones. As a result, this led to the `NaN`s poisoning the computations near the coastlines. To remedy this, we add `generate_lonlat_mask` which only uses a `OutputVar` whose data is zeros and ones to determine the mask. Furthermore, this also improves the memory footprint of the mask whose data can now be stored as booleans. Finally, all masking relating functions are moved to `masks.jl`  to help debloat `Var.jl`.
title: Add Var.generate_lonlat_mask
